property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Users\markr\.jdks\openjdk-25\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\markr\.jdks\openjdk-25\bin;C:\Users\markr\.jdks\openjdk-25\bin;C:\Users\markr\.jdks\openjdk-24\bin;C:\Users\markr\.jdks\openjdk-24\bin;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Workstation\bin\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Users\markr\.jdks\corretto-23.0.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Programs\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\AOMEI\AOMEI Backupper\7.4.2;C:\Users\markr\scoop\apps\maven\current\bin;;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\;C:\Users\markr\scoop\apps\maven\current\bin;C:\Users\markr\scoop\apps\nodejs-lts\current\bin;C:\Users\markr\scoop\apps\nodejs-lts\current;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\markr\.cargo\bin;C:\Users\markr\scoop\shims;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Users\markr\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\Programs\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Users\markr\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Users\markr\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\markr\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\markr\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.

testcase.name: agent_path_for_unknown_reason(Vertx, VertxTestContext)
testcase.system-err: 2026-03-03T12:04:39.475+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.PipelineConfigLoader] Loading pipeline config from classpath: pipeline.yaml 2026-03-03T12:04:39.485+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.PipelineConfigLoader] Pipeline config loaded: handlers=2 tools=2 llm=stub schema.caseIdField=tradeId 2026-03-03T12:04:39.498+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Initialising pipeline from config: addresses=AddressesConfig[inbound=trade.failures, agent=agent.required, events=events.out], llm=stub, handlers=2, tools=2 2026-03-03T12:04:39.498+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.LlmClientFactory] Creating LLM client: type=stub 2026-03-03T12:04:39.500+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.LlmClientFactory] Stub LLM client created with trade-failure rules 2026-03-03T12:04:39.500+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.handler.TradeFailureRuleLoader] Loaded trade-failure stub rules: 1 rules + fallback 2026-03-03T12:04:39.500+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] LLM client resolved: StubLlmClient 2026-03-03T12:04:39.501+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.ToolFactory] Creating tool: type=publish-event 2026-03-03T12:04:39.501+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.ToolFactory] Created tool: name=events.publish type=publish-event 2026-03-03T12:04:39.502+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.ToolFactory] Creating tool: type=raise-ticket 2026-03-03T12:04:39.502+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.ToolFactory] Created tool: name=case.raiseTicket type=raise-ticket 2026-03-03T12:04:39.503+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Tools resolved: [events.publish, case.raiseTicket] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.503+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.HandlerFactory] Creating handler: type=lookup-enrich params={identifier=ISIN} 2026-03-03T12:04:39.503+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.HandlerFactory] Created LookupEnrichHandler for identifier='ISIN' 2026-03-03T12:04:39.503+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.HandlerFactory] Creating handler: type=escalate params={} 2026-03-03T12:04:39.503+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.HandlerFactory] Created EscalateHandler 2026-03-03T12:04:39.503+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Failure handlers resolved: [Missing ISIN, Invalid Counterparty] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.504+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Deploying verticles in sequence... 2026-03-03T12:04:39.506+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Processor started with 2 deterministic handler(s): [Invalid Counterparty, Missing ISIN] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.507+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle deployed 2026-03-03T12:04:39.511+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] AgentRunner starting: address=agent.required maxSteps=5 tools=[events.publish, case.raiseTicket] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.511+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] AgentRunnerVerticle deployed 2026-03-03T12:04:39.512+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.event.EventSinkVerticle] EventSinkVerticle subscribing to: events.out 2026-03-03T12:04:39.515+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] EventSinkVerticle deployed 2026-03-03T12:04:39.518+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.api.HttpApiVerticle] HttpApiVerticle starting: route=/trade/failures target=trade.failures timeout=10000ms allowedFields=[altIds, tradeId, reason] requiredFields=[tradeId, reason] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.622+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.api.HttpApiVerticle] HTTP server started on port 51502 2026-03-03T12:04:39.623+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] MCP server enabled — deploying McpServerVerticle on port 0 2026-03-03T12:04:39.627+0800 INFO [dev.mars.mcp.McpServerVerticle] MCP server started on port 51503 (basePath="", protocol=2025-03-26) 2026-03-03T12:04:39.629+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Pipeline deployed successfully — all verticles started 2026-03-03T12:04:39.632+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Received failure event: tradeId=T-2 reason='LEI not found' 2026-03-03T12:04:39.632+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Routing to agent for reason='LEI not found' 2026-03-03T12:04:39.633+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] Agent invoked for case=T-2 correlationId=6dd83ca1-03ff-4661-ad4c-45ae13bd4b86 2026-03-03T12:04:39.633+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.memory.InMemoryMemoryStore] Memory: new case state created for caseId=T-2 2026-03-03T12:04:39.635+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.llm.StubLlmClient] StubLlmClient evaluating 1 rules for reason='LEI not found' 2026-03-03T12:04:39.635+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.llm.StubLlmClient] Stub rule matched: tool=case.raiseTicket stop=true 2026-03-03T12:04:39.637+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] LLM decided: intent=CALL_TOOL tool=case.raiseTicket stop=true for case=T-2 2026-03-03T12:04:39.657+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] Invoking tool=case.raiseTicket for case=T-2 args={"tradeId":"T-2","category":"ReferenceData","summary":"Counterparty LEI issue","detail":"Failure reason: LEI not found"} 2026-03-03T12:04:39.657+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.tool.RaiseTicketTool] Raising ticket: ticketId=TICKET-e0400f5d-7c0e-4158-9793-8f2d9d2b9789 tradeId=T-2 category=ReferenceData caseId=T-2 2026-03-03T12:04:39.657+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.tool.RaiseTicketTool] Ticket created and TicketCreated event published: ticketId=TICKET-e0400f5d-7c0e-4158-9793-8f2d9d2b9789 2026-03-03T12:04:39.658+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.event.EventSinkVerticle] [EVENTS_OUT] {"type":"TicketCreated","ticketId":"TICKET-e0400f5d-7c0e-4158-9793-8f2d9d2b9789","tradeId":"T-2","category":"ReferenceData","correlationId":"6dd83ca1-03ff-4661-ad4c-45ae13bd4b86","caseId":"T-2"} 2026-03-03T12:04:39.658+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] Tool case.raiseTicket completed for case=T-2 result={"status":"created","ticketId":"TICKET-e0400f5d-7c0e-4158-9793-8f2d9d2b9789","tradeId":"T-2","category":"ReferenceData","summary":"Counterparty LEI issue"} 2026-03-03T12:04:39.659+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.memory.InMemoryMemoryStore] Memory: appended entry for caseId=T-2 newStep=1 2026-03-03T12:04:39.659+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] Agent completed for case=T-2 after 1 step(s) 2026-03-03T12:04:39.661+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Agent returned result for trade=T-2 reason='LEI not found'

testcase.name: deterministic_path_for_missing_isin(Vertx, VertxTestContext)
testcase.system-err: 2026-03-03T12:04:39.686+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.PipelineConfigLoader] Loading pipeline config from classpath: pipeline.yaml 2026-03-03T12:04:39.691+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.PipelineConfigLoader] Pipeline config loaded: handlers=2 tools=2 llm=stub schema.caseIdField=tradeId 2026-03-03T12:04:39.692+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Initialising pipeline from config: addresses=AddressesConfig[inbound=trade.failures, agent=agent.required, events=events.out], llm=stub, handlers=2, tools=2 2026-03-03T12:04:39.692+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.ToolFactory] Created tool: name=events.publish type=publish-event 2026-03-03T12:04:39.693+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.ToolFactory] Creating tool: type=raise-ticket resolved: [events.publish, case.raiseTicket] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.693+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.HandlerFactory] Creating handler: type=lookup-enrich params={identifier=ISIN} Creating handler: type=escalate params={} 2026-03-03T12:04:39.694+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.config.HandlerFactory] Created EscalateHandler 2026-03-03T12:04:39.694+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Failure handlers resolved: [Missing ISIN, Invalid Counterparty] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.694+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Deploying verticles in sequence... 2026-03-03T12:04:39.695+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Processor started with 2 deterministic handler(s): [Invalid Counterparty, Missing ISIN] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.696+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle deployed 2026-03-03T12:04:39.697+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.runner.AgentRunnerVerticle] AgentRunner starting: address=agent.required maxSteps=5 tools=[events.publish, case.raiseTicket] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.697+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] AgentRunnerVerticle deployed 2026-03-03T12:04:39.698+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.event.EventSinkVerticle] EventSinkVerticle subscribing to: events.out 2026-03-03T12:04:39.698+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] EventSinkVerticle deployed 2026-03-03T12:04:39.700+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.api.HttpApiVerticle] HttpApiVerticle starting: route=/trade/failures target=trade.failures timeout=10000ms allowedFields=[altIds, tradeId, reason] requiredFields=[tradeId, reason] 2026-03-03T12:04:39.702+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.api.HttpApiVerticle] HTTP server started on port 51504 2026-03-03T12:04:39.702+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] MCP server enabled — deploying McpServerVerticle on port 0 2026-03-03T12:04:39.704+0800 INFO [dev.mars.mcp.McpServerVerticle] MCP server started on port 51505 (basePath="", protocol=2025-03-26) 2026-03-03T12:04:39.705+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.MainVerticle] Pipeline deployed successfully — all verticles started 2026-03-03T12:04:39.706+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Received failure event: tradeId=T-1 reason='Missing ISIN' 2026-03-03T12:04:39.707+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Deterministic path for reason='Missing ISIN' 2026-03-03T12:04:39.707+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.handler.LookupEnrichHandler] Lookup+enrich ISIN for trade=T-1 2026-03-03T12:04:39.707+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.handler.LookupEnrichHandler] Published TradeRepaired event for trade=T-1 (ISIN) 2026-03-03T12:04:39.707+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.processor.DeterministicFailureProcessorVerticle] Deterministic handling succeeded for trade=T-1 reason='Missing ISIN' resultType=TradeRepaired 2026-03-03T12:04:39.708+0800 INFO [dev.mars.agent.event.EventSinkVerticle] [EVENTS_OUT] {"type":"TradeRepaired","tradeId":"T-1","by":"deterministic-processor","details":{"action":"lookup+enrich ISIN"}}
